entities.name: RISK ATTITUDE
entities.description: The psychological tendency of farmers to take or avoid risks in decision making

entities.name: DECISION MAKING PROCESSES
entities.description: The cognitive process of choosing between alternatives in farming

entities.name: ADOPTION OF NEW TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: The process of farmers integrating new agricultural methods

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The improvement of agricultural productivity and sustainability

entities.name: PERSONAL CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Individual traits of farmers that influence their behavior

entities.name: MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Andhra Pradesh where the study was conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the study took place

entities.name: EXPERIMENTAL METHODS
entities.description: Techniques involving real payoffs to assess risk attitudes

entities.name: MEAN-VARIANCE (E-V) UTILITY FUNCTION
entities.description: A mathematical function used to calculate risk aversion coefficients

entities.name: RISK AVERSION COEFFICIENTS
entities.description: Numerical values representing the degree of risk aversion

entities.name: RISK AVERSION
entities.description: The tendency to prefer a certain outcome over a risky one with the same expected value

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation, which affects risk attitudes

entities.name: ACCESS TO CREDIT
entities.description: The availability of loans for farmers

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain from agricultural activities

entities.name: AGE OF HOUSEHOLD HEAD
entities.description: The age of the primary decision-maker in the family

entities.name: FAMILY SIZE
entities.description: The number of members in the household
